raw_description: David Willey bowls a full, out-swinging delivery outside off stump, which Rishabh Pant attempts to drive but misses.
David Willey delivers another full, out-swinging ball outside off, which Rishabh Pant again tries to drive but fails to make contact.
Willey delivers a full, in-swinging ball on off stump, which Rohit Sharma defends on the front foot, pushing it straight for a single.
David Willey bowls another full, in-swinging delivery on off stump, which Rohit Sharma defends straight, allowing the batsmen to take a single.
Reece Topley bowls a full, out-swinging delivery outside off stump, which Rishabh Pant attempts to drive but gets an outside edge, caught by the wicketkeeper.
Reece Topley bowls a full, out-swinging delivery outside off to Rishabh Pant, who attempts a front-foot defense, gets an outside edge, and is caught by the wicketkeeper.
Topley bowls a good length in-swinger that Kohli defends off the front foot, getting an inside edge onto his pads for a dot ball.
Topley bowls a full delivery outside off, which Kohli lofts cleanly over cover for a boundary.
Reece Topley bowls a good length out-swinger outside off, which Rohit Sharma defends off the front foot, mistiming it onto the splice of his bat for a dot ball.
Willey bowls a good length in-swinger that Kohli misses, hitting his pads, and is given out LBW.
Willey bowls a full delivery on the legs, which Kohli flicks cleanly over mid-on for a boundary.
Willey bowls a full, out-swinging delivery outside off, and Kohli gives himself room to loft it cleanly over deep cover for a magnificent six.
Willey bowls another full, out-swinging delivery, and Kohli attempts to loft it over cover again but mistimes it, resulting in a catch by Jason Roy.
David Willey bowls a full, in-swinging delivery on the pads, which Suryakumar Yadav flicks off his front foot for a single towards fine leg.
David Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav plays a back foot defensive shot towards point for a dot ball.
Richard Gleeson bowls a full delivery on off stump, Suryakumar Yadav plays a front foot defensive shot straight back to the bowler.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav defends it on the front foot towards mid-off for a single.
Gleeson delivers a good length ball outside off, Rohit Sharma plays a front-foot defence towards mid-off for a single.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery just outside off, Suryakumar Yadav defends it off the front foot.
Gleeson bowls another good length delivery on off stump, Suryakumar Yadav defends it cleanly.
Gleeson bowls a full delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav drives it cleanly through the covers for four.
Topley bowls a full delivery outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav defends off the front foot straight to the fielder.
Topley bowls a good length delivery on off stump, which Rohit Sharma defends with soft hands to mid-off for a quick single.
Topley bowls a full delivery wide down the leg side, which Suryakumar leaves, resulting in a wide.
Topley bowls a good length delivery on off stump, which Suryakumar defends off the front foot towards mid-off for a single.
Rohit Sharma flicks a full delivery from Topley off his pads through the leg side for a boundary.
Topley bowls a slower full delivery, which Rohit Sharma attempts to sweep but misses, resulting in a dot ball.
Rohit Sharma plays a lofted drive off a full delivery from Topley, sending it over the infield for a boundary through deep cover.
Reece Topley bowls a slower full delivery, which Rohit Sharma attempts to loft straight down the ground but is caught by Phil Salt in the deep.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery on off stump, which Shreyas Iyer defends cleanly off his front foot to the leg side for a dot ball.
Gleeson delivers a good length ball outside off, which Shreyas Iyer defends off his front foot towards cover for no run.
Pace bowler Gleeson delivers a good length ball outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav defends off the front foot for a dot ball.
Gleeson bowls another good length delivery outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav pushes off the front foot for a single to cover.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar defends it off the front foot for a single.
Gleeson bowls another good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar defends it off the front foot for a single.
Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav plays a well-timed square cut through deep point for four runs.
Willey bowls a full, in-swinging delivery on the pads, Suryakumar Yadav flicks it with ease over deep mid-wicket for a maximum.
Pace bowler David Willey delivers a good length ball on off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav defends off the front foot towards mid-wicket for a single.
David Willey bowls another good length delivery on off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav pushes off the front foot towards mid-wicket for a single.
Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav goes back and cuts it cleanly to deep point for a single.
Willey delivers a full ball outside off, Suryakumar Yadav drives it cleanly through the covers for two runs.
Chris Jordan bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar plays a clean front-foot cover drive for a single.
Chris Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, Suryakumar attempts a front-foot drive but misses the ball completely.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav goes back and cuts it to third man for a single.
Jordan delivers a good length ball outside off, Suryakumar Yadav cuts it off the back foot to third man for a single.
Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav drives it cleanly through the covers for a boundary.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav leans into a clean front-foot cover drive for a one-bounce boundary.
Jordan bowls a full slower ball on middle and leg, Suryakumar Yadav flicks it off his pads for a single to mid-wicket.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery on off stump, which Suryakumar defends cleanly to mid-on for a dot ball.
Livingstone bowls a short and wide leg-break outside off, which Suryakumar cuts powerfully behind square for a boundary.
Livingstone bowls a good length leg-break outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav defends off the front foot, resulting in a dot ball.
Livingstone bowls a short leg-break on the leg stump, which Suryakumar Yadav flicks off his back foot to deep square leg for a boundary.
Livingstone bowls a full leg-break well down the leg side, which Suryakumar Yadav misses, and the umpire signals a wide.
Livingstone bowls a full leg-break on the pads, Suryakumar Yadav flicks it cleanly off his front foot through long-on for four runs.
Livingstone bowls a good length off-break, Suryakumar Yadav defends it off the back foot back to the bowler.
Livingstone delivers a full ball on off stump, Suryakumar Yadav drives it straight down the ground for two runs.
Moeen Ali bowls a full off-break on off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav drives cleanly through covers for two runs, saved by a good dive from the fielder.
Moeen Ali bowls a full off-break outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav attempts to drive but misses.
Moeen Ali bowls a full toss on the leg stump, which Suryakumar Yadav dispatches with a powerful lofted shot over deep mid-wicket for six.
Moeen Ali bowls a good length off-break outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav defends cleanly to cover.
Moeen Ali bowls a full off-break outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav pushes off the front foot to cover for a single.
Moeen Ali bowls a very wide full delivery outside off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav leaves, resulting in a wide call from the umpire.
Moeen Ali bowls a good length off-break on off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav flicks off his pads to deep mid-wicket for a single.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery on off stump, Suryakumar plays a front-foot defensive shot towards mid-off for a single.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery on off stump, Shreyas Iyer plays a front-foot defensive shot towards mid-off for a single.
Jordan bowls a good length delivery on off stump, Suryakumar plays a front-foot defensive shot towards mid-off for a single.
Chris Jordan bowls a good length delivery outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav defends cleanly off the front foot for a dot ball.
Chris Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav lofts cleanly over extra cover for a boundary four.
Chris Jordan bowls a yorker-length delivery on off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav digs out with a straight bat for a single.
Topley bowls a full delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav drives it through the covers for a single to bring up his fifty.
Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav defends it to point for a single.
Topley bowls a full, out-swinging delivery outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav drives cleanly through deep cover for two runs.
Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off that angles away, which Suryakumar Yadav attempts to defend but misses completely.
Topley delivers a full, out-swinging ball outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav drives through cover for a single.
Reece Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav plays a front foot defense and takes a single to mid-off.
Liam Livingstone bowls a full leg break on middle, Suryakumar Yadav lofts it cleanly over long-on for a six.
Liam Livingstone bowls a full leg-break outside off, and Suryakumar Yadav sweeps it cleanly for a single to deep mid-wicket.
Suryakumar Yadav steps down the pitch to a full off-break delivery and lofts it cleanly over long-off for a six.
Livingstone bowls a full off-break, and Suryakumar attempts a reverse sweep but misses, with the ball going to the keeper. It is called a no-ball for overstepping.
Suryakumar Yadav steps forward to a full delivery outside off and lofts it cleanly over long-off for a maximum on a free hit.
Livingstone bowls a good length off-break outside off, which turns sharply past Suryakumar Yadav's defensive front-foot shot, leading to a stumping.
Gleeson bowls a good length delivery outside off, Suryakumar plays a late cut behind point for a single.
Gleeson bowls a short, wide bouncer, and Suryakumar expertly upper cuts it over the third man boundary for a six.
The pace bowler delivered a good length ball on off stump, which the right-handed batsman Suryakumar pushed off his front foot towards mid-on for a single.
Suryakumar Yadav plays a wristy flick off a slower leg cutter from Gleeson, sending the ball very fine on the leg side for a boundary.
Suryakumar Yadav flicks a full delivery from Gleeson off his pads towards deep mid-wicket for two runs.
Chris Jordan bowls a full, wide delivery outside off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav leaves. The umpire signals a wide.
Suryakumar Yadav shuffles across his stumps to a full delivery on leg stump and scoops it cleanly over short fine leg for a boundary.
Jordan bowls a yorker outside off, Suryakumar shuffles across and drives it cleanly through deep cover for four runs.
Jordan bowls a slower ball on a good length, Suryakumar defends it into the off-side for a quick single.
Pace bowler Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, and Iyer flicks it off his pads for a single behind square on the leg side.
Pace bowler Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, and Suryakumar Yadav lofts it cleanly over deep cover for a six.
Reece Topley bowls a good length outswinger outside off stump, which Shreyas Iyer attempts to defend but gets a faint outside edge through to the wicketkeeper for a wicket.
Topley bowls a full, in-swinging delivery on leg stump, which Karthik flicks cleanly off his front foot to deep mid-wicket for a dot ball.
Reece Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off, which Dinesh Karthik attempts to defend on the back foot, getting an outside edge caught by the wicketkeeper for a wicket.
Reece Topley bowls another good length delivery outside off, which Dinesh Karthik tries to defend on the back foot but misses completely.
Reece Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off, which Dinesh Karthik defends cleanly on the back foot to the point region.
Pace bowler Topley bowls a good length delivery outside off, which Karthik defends off the front foot for a single towards point.
Topley bowls a short of length delivery wide outside off, which Suryakumar Yadav upper cuts off the back foot over deep point for a boundary.
David Willey bowls a full delivery outside off, and Dinesh Karthik steps forward to loft it cleanly over mid-off for a one-bounce boundary.
A full, wide delivery down the leg side from Willey, which Suryakumar leaves, resulting in a wide.
A full delivery on leg stump from Willey, flicked by Karthik off his front foot to deep mid-wicket for a single.
Suryakumar Yadav plays a powerful back-foot square cut off a short delivery outside off stump, sending the ball to the deep point boundary for four runs and bringing up his century.
Suryakumar Yadav drives a good length delivery towards mid-off for a quick single, keeping the strike.
Willey bowls a full, in-swinging delivery that traps Suryakumar Yadav LBW, with the on-field not out decision overturned on review.
David Willey bowls a good length delivery outside off, which Ravindra Jadeja defends cleanly on his front foot for a dot ball.
David Willey bowls a full delivery on middle and leg, Suryakumar Yadav steps across and flicks it off his pads for a single towards fine leg.
Richard Gleeson bowls a good length cutter outside off, Suryakumar Yadav attempts a drive but is completely beaten, resulting in a dot ball.
Gleeson bowls a full toss that Jadeja lofts straight back over the bowler's head for a six.
Gleeson bowls a full, straight delivery that Jadeja misses, hitting him on the pads for a clear LBW.

Pace bowler Gleeson bowls a full delivery on middle stump, which Suryakumar Yadav attempts to sweep but misses, getting struck on the pad and given out LBW after a DRS review confirmed wickets hitting.
Gleeson bowls a pinpoint yorker on off stump, which Harshal Patel defends cleanly back down the pitch.
Gleeson bowls a full delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav drives it straight down the ground for a single.
Gleeson bowls another full delivery outside off, Suryakumar Yadav pushes it straight down the ground for a single.
Moeen Ali bowls a wide off-break outside off stump, which Suryakumar Yadav leaves without offering a shot.
Moeen Ali bowls a full off-break on leg stump, which Suryakumar Yadav sweeps cleanly for a boundary through deep square leg.
Suryakumar Yadav steps out to a full off-break from Moeen Ali and lofts it cleanly over deep mid-wicket for a massive six.
Suryakumar Yadav plays a clean square drive off a full delivery from Moeen Ali, sending it to the deep point boundary for four runs.
Moeen Ali bowls a full off-break on leg stump, Suryakumar Yadav attempts to loft it over long-off but mistimes it off the toe end of the bat, caught by Salt.
Chris Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off stump, which Avesh Khan defends off the front foot and takes a quick single.
Chris Jordan bowls a perfect yorker on the stumps, which Harshal Patel digs out defensively, resulting in a dot ball.
Chris Jordan bowls a full, intended yorker outside off, which Harshal Patel attempts to scoop but gets a top edge, resulting in a catch for Gleeson.
Chris Jordan bowls a full delivery outside off, which Ravi Bishnoi drives cleanly down the ground for two runs.
Chris Jordan bowls a pinpoint yorker on off stump, which Ravi Bishnoi misses, resulting in him being bowled.
